title: Tama’s Kidnapping Exposes Wano’s Cruelty
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Tsuru, Unknown person #6, Imu, Garp, Unknown person #7 as Luffy and Zoro push into Kuri and Bakura Town as Tama’s kidnapping exposes the cruelty of the Beast Pirates.
scene: Luffy and Zoro move through Kuri and Bakura Town while Tama’s kidnapping pulls them into open conflict with the Beast Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is this the first time you've eaten that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: She weaves BamboO hats all day!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She barely survives by eating millet, and that's only sometimes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's got Moch! In it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is such a luxurious meal...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'm so grateful!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this has to be my best birthday ever!! I feel bad for my master, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mochl~ > Moch!~ >

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can pop out Mochi from your cheek, can't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, but that won't stop hunger.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OOF...

dialogue.speaker: Tsuru
dialogue.text: O-TSURU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Today is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The best day of my life!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Children like O-TAMA can be found every- where...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: in the current Wano Country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The company has developed

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's crazy that a little girl like her is able to go hungry...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although, once she gets older, she can eat poisoned food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: & No... she can't?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are rivers, mountains, and forests here. No one should have any trouble finding food!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That wouldn't be the case if certain individuals hadn't made an effort to contaminants those natural resources.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're right...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You both are quite kind... Oh, how rude of me! What are your names?

dialogue.speaker: Imu
dialogue.text: Imu zerojuro, a Ronin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm monkey D...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's LuffyTaro.

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: That's right. I'm Luffy- Taro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: -Gozaru.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Fufufu, you're foreigners, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You talk strangely.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess you managed to successfully enter this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How'd she notice...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not worry. Nobody will rat you out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I am also new in this town.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Kiku's only been here for a month...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You said that this was a town of leftovers, didn't you? Why's that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like the name suggests... we are leftovers from the town where the government officials currently reside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's how everyone ended up here.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tama told me about a place where the food isn't poisonous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you see that mountain over there with no smoke rising above it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There used to be a castle on top of it. It was visible from here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That was often castle.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: But that was over 20 years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oden Castle...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden... I think I've heard that name before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What was it again....

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Over 20 years ago... the Kouzuki clan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ruled over the Wano Country, as they had been doing for a very long time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The now deceased Lord open built it so that the residents of Kuri could eat delicious food.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sweet sake

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was nothing like the food that Crochi and his subordinates manipulate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It was a paradise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does that place have food without any poison!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It does... delicious, safe to eat ingredients,

dialogue.speaker: Okobore Town Villagers
dialogue.text: Clean Water, and clothes...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: But Shogun Orochi owns that farm now.

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kuri storyline with 58 dialogue beats. The rescue of Tama brings Luffy, Zoro, Kiku, and Law into direct contact with Wano’s local oppression.
